$note: Typecheck lane for test files, which the main tsconfig deliberately excludes (jest runs @swc/jest, transpile-only — without this lane test files get no typechecking at all). Run via `npm run check:tests`. The two index/optional strict flags are pinned off here: production code is clean under them (tsconfig.target.json) but the test tree still has ~420 violations — flipping them here is tracked follow-up burndown work.
